articles.headline: Airbase raises $5 million to tackle spectrum bottleneck as FCC eyes new space uses

The post Airbase raises $5 million to tackle spectrum bottleneck as FCC eyes new spa...
articles.takeaway: Airbase's spectrum coordination software addresses a critical infrastructure gap as FCC allocates frequencies to competing space-based services, potentially accelerating deployment of satellite constellations and terrestrial networks.

articles.headline: JetBlue Flight Halted After Bizarre Runway Encounter With Coyote
articles.blurb: The aircraft did not suffer any damage and was back in the air shortly after the incident, transporting passengers to their original destination.
articles.takeaway: Wildlife incursions at major airports represent an underappreciated operational disruption risk that airlines must factor into scheduling and contingency planning.

articles.headline: Warehouse drones are quietly transforming alcohol distribution across America

articles.headline: Selecting Risk Controls and Accepting Residual Risk
articles.blurb: Where Safety Risk Management moves from analysis to action — how organizations develop controls under §5.55(c)–(d).
articles.takeaway: Organizations must document their risk acceptance rationale for residual risks after implementing controls, creating auditable evidence of deliberate safety decisions.

articles.headline: SMS Declaration of Compliance
articles.blurb: What the SMS Declaration of Compliance means for operators and what the FAA expects.
articles.takeaway: SMS Declaration of Compliance is now mandatory for operators, requiring documented safety management systems that the FAA will actively audit for compliance verification.

articles.headline: Flying in the Unforgiving Wire Environment (The Rotorcraft Collective)
articles.blurb: Many pilots mistakenly believe they will have sufficient reaction time if they encounter power lines and other wires. Yet wire strikes have been among the top three causes of fatal helicopter accident
articles.takeaway: Wire strike fatalities persist despite pilot overconfidence in reaction time, indicating that enhanced detection systems rather than pilot awareness alone are critical for rotorcraft safety.

articles.headline: Pave Space raises $40 million to develop European heavy kickstage

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. This paper reviews how advanced technologies and methods can expand capacity and improve efficiency across airline, airport, and flight operations. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational optimization across airline, airport, and flight domains can simultaneously address capacity constraints and environmental impact as air traffic demand continues rising.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
